## Professional Service

### University Service

| Years | Activity |
|------:|----------|
| **2024–2025** | **Member**, Research Impacts Working Group, Social Science Research Institute, Penn State. Contribute metrics for measuring research impact. |
| **2023–2024** | **Member**, Search Committee, Environmental Health Science Initiative, College of Health and Human Development, Penn State. Participated in candidate screening, assessment, and interviews for two tenure-track positions with SSRI and ICDS affiliations. |
| **2023–2025** | **Member**, Professional Preparation, Development, and Evaluation (PPD&E) Committee, Department of Human Development and Family Studies, Penn State. Participate in data curation across HDFS programs, preparation of departmental identity surveys, committee discussions, and departmental planning. |
| **2025-2026** | **Member**, Graduate Program Committee, Department of Human Development and Family Studies, Penn State. Active participant in planning of upcoming graduate program revisions and program enhancements. |

### Federal Funding Review

| Year | Activity |
|-----:|----------|
| **2024** | **Early Career Reviewer**, National Institutes of Health (NIH), Human Complex Mental Function (HCMF) Study Section. Reviewed grant applications and provided critiques and impact scores for funding consideration. |
| **2023** | **Early Career Reviewer**, National Institutes of Health (NIH), F02B Study Section. Reviewed grant applications and provided critiques and impact scores for funding consideration. |

### Professional Leadership

| Years | Leadership Role |
|------:|-----------------|
| **2024–2026** | **Program Chair**, American Psychological Association (APA), Division 20 (Adult Development and Aging). |
| **2014–2016** | **Graduate Student Representative**, American Psychological Association (APA), Division 20 (Adult Development and Aging). Developed strategies to increase membership, produced newsletter content, and organized conference social events. |

### Professional Society Service

| Years | Activity |
|------:|----------|
| **2022, 2025, 2026** | **Early Career Award Reviewer**, Society for Ambulatory Assessment (SAA). Reviewed applications for the Society for Ambulatory Assessment Early Career Award. |
| **2018, 2019** | **Conference Abstract Reviewer**, American Psychological Association (APA), Division 20 (Adult Development and Aging). |
| **2020** | **Student Grant Reviewer**, Department of Kinesiology, Penn State University. Participated in a mock NIH-style study section review. |
| **2019** | **External Reviewer**, Society for Research in Child Development (SRCD), Student and Early Career Council Dissertation Research Funding Awards. |
| **2015** | **Poster Judge**, Division 20 Poster Session, American Psychological Association Annual Meeting. |

### Editorial and Peer Review Activities

**Ad Hoc Reviewer**

- *Applied Ergonomics*
- *Frontiers in Digital Health*
- *International Journal of Psychophysiology*
- *Journal of Applied Gerontology*
- *Journal of Experimental Psychology: Applied*
- *Journal of Gerontology: Psychological Sciences*
- *Journal of Medical Internet Research (JMIR)*
- *JMIR Serious Games*
- *Journal of Visualized Experiments (JoVE)*
